title: tragopogon humilis
intro: Tragopogon humilis, also known as the low salsify or dwarf salsify, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tragopogon humilis are also used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
